mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role != 'ADMIN') AS total_members, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetings WHERE deletedAt IS NULL) AS total_meetings, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = "PENDING") AS pending_reports, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sports) AS total_sports

SELECT u.userId, u.loginId, u.nickname, u.profileImage, CASE WHEN r.regionId IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT(r.sido, ' ', r.sigungu, ' ', r.dong) END AS regionName, u.role, u.status FROM users u LEFT JOIN regions r ON u.regionId = r.regionId ORDER BY u.userId DESC
SELECT regionId, sido, sigungu, dong FROM regions ORDER BY sido ASC, sigungu ASC, dong ASC

SELECT m.meetingId, m.title, s.name AS sportName, s.category AS sportCategory, CONCAT(r.sido, ' ', r.sigungu, ' ', r.dong) AS regionName, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetingParticipants mp WHERE mp.meetingId = m.meetingId AND mp.status = 'APPROVED' ) AS approvedCount, m.maxMembers, m.status, u.nickname AS hostNickname, m.meetingDate, m.startTime, m.createdAt FROM meetings m JOIN users u ON m.hostUserId = u.userId JOIN sports s ON m.sportId = s.sportId JOIN regions r ON m.regionId = r.regionId WHERE m.deletedAt IS NULL ORDER BY m.meetingId DESC
SELECT reportId, reason, status, createdAt FROM reports ORDER BY reportId DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status = #{status}, processedAt = NOW() WHERE reportId = #{reportId}
UPDATE meetings SET status = #{status}, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE meetingId = #{meetingId}
